cross_poker.title: Cross Poker
cross_poker.description: A logic deduction puzzle — figure out the hidden cards using poker hand clues on a 5×5 board

crossPoker.title: Cross Poker
crossPoker.subtitle: Deduce hidden cards using poker hand clues
crossPoker.correct_message: Congratulations! You found all hidden cards.
crossPoker.incorrect_message: Some cards are wrong. Try again.
crossPoker.rules_text: 25 of 28 cards (8–A, 4 suits) are placed on a 5×5 board. Each row, column, and diagonal forms a poker hand. Use the revealed cards and hand clues to deduce the hidden ones.
